## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on contract terms for a potential partnership between GrowthX and Navan.](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Navan proposes a 3-month initial phase (Nov 1 - Jan 31) followed by a potential 12-month agreement](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [GrowthX's pricing floor is $15k/month for Phase 2, including daily content publishing and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Laptop requirement likely unnecessary; background check may not apply for this engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [DPA and security addendum will be required; GrowthX to review and provide initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)

## Topics

### Contract Structure and Timeline

  - [Proposal: 3-month Phase 1 (Nov 1 - Jan 31) + 12-month Phase 2 (Feb 1, 2026 - Jan 31, 2027)](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Two separate agreements/POs: one for Phase 1, another for Phase 2](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Navan to decide on Phase 2 by Jan 15th](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Word doc version of contract for review](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)

### Pricing and Services

  - [Phase 1: Strategy sprint (pricing TBD)](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Phase 2: $15k/month floor](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Includes: 5 pieces of content published weekly, LLM visibility, analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Dedicated team: Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [ROI metrics tracked: Technical SEO, content quantity, reach (impressions, clicks, rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Analytics provided via Looker dashboard and Scrunch for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### Operational Details

  - [Laptop requirement likely unnecessary](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Background check may not apply as GrowthX is the contracting party, not individual resources](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Platform access for Navan expected by Phase 2 start (90% certainty)](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Legal and Compliance

  - [DPA and security addendum required by Navan's CISO](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [GrowthX to review and provide initial feedback, highlighting main concerns](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to discuss internally and send revised Word doc contract by Tuesday morning](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [Navan to review contract with finance team and address budget allocation](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [GrowthX to review DPA and security addendum, providing initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=1819.0)
  - [Both parties to continue discussions on finalizing agreement terms](https://fathom.video/share/Nex14zxuDUWbJmk7TPKYpziHEasTaiTk?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
